audience: English-speaking decision-makers evaluating VisualVibe's team, background and breadth
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Kennismaken met VisualVibe, oprichter Jens Hardy en de werkwijze van het mediabureau.

searchIntent.question: Who is behind VisualVibe and what services does the agency combine?

directAnswer: VisualVibe is a Limburg-based creative media agency founded by Jens Hardy. It combines seven creative and technical disciplines through one point of contact.
title: About VisualVibe and Jens Hardy | Media agency in Limburg
metaDescription: Meet VisualVibe and founder Jens Hardy, the Limburg creative media agency for web design, SEO, photography, video, drone and immersive media.
h1: One partner for digital experiences and visual stories
factsToPreserve: The source states seven disciplines and three partners
WeddingVibe is presented as a separate wedding label
